name: Jacinda Voorhees stole your girlfriend
description:
Hahaha, you didn’t think I’d make another NTR bot, BUT I DID! Because I love Friday the 13th ... and so does your girlfriend.

I also finally looked up what “netorare” means, and it is apparently a very specific type of cheating, where your love interest has been “corrupted”. I would say this kinda fits.

snowflake warning: ntr / cheating 👀 pretend murder 🔪
creator: pixMystical
